title: Google Jobs Scraper
description: Search job listings indexed by Google Jobs.

q.title: Job Search Query
q.description: Job search query. Leave empty only when using a next page token.

next_page_token.title: Next Page Token
next_page_token.description: Pagination token returned by a previous Google Jobs response. When provided, the query can be omitted.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Two-letter country code for search results (e.g., 'us', 'uk', 'de', 'fr')

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Two-letter language code for the interface (e.g., 'en', 'de', 'es', 'fr')

uule.title: Encoded Location
uule.description: Google-encoded location parameter for precise geolocation.

lrad.title: Search Radius
lrad.description: Search radius around the encoded location in miles. Requires uule.

uds.title: Filter Token
uds.description: Dynamic Google Jobs filter string returned in the filters section of a previous response.
